entities.name: starter kit
entities.context: Opinionated, easy-to-adopt tool for non-technical users to reduce intimidation around system-building

entities.name: system-building
entities.context: Process that may intimidate non-technical users unless made accessible

entities.name: high-value connectors
entities.context: Persona type with scarce time and attention who need workflows that produce quick visible results

entities.name: visible relief
entities.context: Quick, tangible outcome that workflows must produce to be adopted (e.g., better follow-up, fewer dropped intros)

entities.name: dropped intros
entities.context: Problem to solve for connectors; introductions that fall through the cracks

relationships.context: Starter kit is the accessible entry point to system-building for non-technical users
Connectors need workflows that produce visible relief quickly to justify their scarce time
Reducing dropped intros is one form of visible relief that validates a workflow
